title: 挑戦！夢は叶えるものッ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I go to see a race on my day off, when...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Come on, come on! Almost theeeere!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And she's done it! What an amazing runaway
finish!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: YEAAAAAH! Congratulations! That was sooo good!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yaaay! Awesome! So awesome! That blew me
away too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Totally! It's like their hopes of winning were
crashing into each other and making sparks!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! So that's what made everyone shine so
bright!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Sooo cool... I wish I could run like they do. If only
I was that fast.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh?! If you wanna run, just run! You'll be fine!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But everyone told me to give up. I always finish
dead last in races...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hrmmm... Then I'll give you a test! And if you
pass, it means you'll be able to race in the future!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
A test? I'm not sure I've got what it takes to
pass...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: We'll seeee... It is a test, after all, and I'm a super-duper tough test giver!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Think you're up for the challenge?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...Y-yeah! I'll try! I have to, 'cause this is my
dream!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All riiiight! That's what I like to hear! Okay, let's get started!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
First, we're gonna play tag! And then, we're
gonna play on the slides in the park! And after
that, snack time!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Got it! ...Wait, is that stuff all that tough to do?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: No time for questions! Here we go!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Tag! Got ya! Okay, now for the slides! Ooh, and
let's get some donuts from that store over there!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Donuts? Yay! I want a cream-filled one!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Phew! That concludes the test. And now for the
result...

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Gulp...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You pass! With flying colors! You really dug deep
till the very end, huh?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I passed?! Yay, I did it! So I can be a racer!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But, you know, that really wasn't a "super-duper
tough" test.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Well, whatever life throws at you, the only
correct answer is to try your best, right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
As long as you've got that same desire to run,
you'll be fine! I know you'll make your dreams
come true someday!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I've been chasing my own dream too—for a long,
loooong time. That's why I'm running in all these
exciting races!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Wow... You're right! One day, I'm gonna be a
runner who shines super bright, just like you!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna go tell my mom! Thanks so much!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You've got this! Hehe, it's like I'm looking at me
when I was that age.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! I'm feeling fired up all of a sudden! Time
for a quick run!
